actionCalls.description: Calls an action to save the benefit verification step details when a timeout occurs for the Payer assessment response.
actionCalls.name: SavePayerAssessmentTimeoutMessage
actionCalls.label: Save Payer Assessment Timeout Message

assignments.description: Sets the AppliedLimit field on the UpdateCoverageBenefitItemLimit variable to the value of the ResponseValue field and the coverage Benefit Item limit Id variable to the value of the coverage benefit item limit id field of the current record in the IterateOverAssessmentQuestionResponses loop. Adds the UpdateCoverageBenefitItemLimit record variable to the UpdateCoverageBenefitItemLimitList record collection.
assignments.name: SetAppliedLimitValue
assignments.label: Set Applied Limit Value

assignments.description: Sets the AssessmentId variable to the AssessmentId of the current record in the IterateOverAssessmentEnvelopeItems loop.
assignments.name: SetAssessmentId
assignments.label: Set Assessment ID

assignments.description: Sets the AssessmentQuestionName variable to the Name field of the current record in the IterateOverAssessmentQuestionResponsesGetVersionNumber loop.
assignments.name: SetAssessmentQuestionResponseName
assignments.label: Set Assessment Question Response Name

assignments.description: Sets the VersionNumber variable to the value calculated by the ExtractVersionFormula.
assignments.name: SetAssessmentVersionNumber
assignments.label: Set Assessment Version Number

assignments.description: Sets the BenefitNotes field on the UpdatedCoverageBenefit variable to the value of the ResponseValue field of the current record in the IterateOverAssessmentQuestionResponses loop.
assignments.name: SetBenefitNotes
assignments.label: Set Benefit Notes

assignments.description: Sets the CoverageBenefitItemId variable to the ID of the current record in the IterateOverCoverageBenefitItems loop.
assignments.name: SetCoverageBenefitItemId
assignments.label: Set Coverage Benefit Item ID

assignments.description: Sets the FinalCoverageStatusCodeId field on the UpdatedCoverageBenefit variable to the value of the ResponseValue field of the current record in the IterateOverAssessmentQuestionResponses loop.
assignments.name: SetFinalCoverageStatusCodeId
assignments.label: Set Final Coverage Status Code Id

assignments.description: Sets the IsInPlanNetwork field on the UpdateCoverageBenefitItem variable to true, the InNetworkCoverage field to 'In Network,' and the OutofNetworkCoverage field to an empty string. Also sets the ID of the UpdateCoverageBenefitItem variable to the CoverageBenefitItemId variable.
assignments.name: SetInNetworkCoverage
assignments.label: Set In-Network Coverage

assignments.description: Sets the IsCoverageBenefitItemRequiresSave flag to true.
assignments.name: SetIsCoverageBenefitItemRqrSaveFlag
assignments.label: Set Coverage BenefitItem Requires Save Flag

assignments.description: Sets the IsCoverageBenefitRequiresSave flag to true and assigns the Coverage Benefit from GetCoverageBenefit record variable to the CoverageBenefit variable.
assignments.name: SetIsCoverageBenefitRequiresSaveFlag
assignments.label: Set IsCoverageBenefitRequiresSave Flag

assignments.description: Sets the IsPreauthorizationRequired field on the UpdateCoverageBenefitItem variable to false. Also sets the ID of the UpdateCoverageBenefitItem variable to the CoverageBenefitItemId variable.
assignments.name: SetIsPreauthorizationRequiredFalse
assignments.label: Set Preauthorization Required

assignments.description: Sets the IsInPlanNetwork field on the UpdateCoverageBenefitItem variable to false, the OutofNetworkCoverage field to 'Out of Network,' and the InNetworkCoverage field to an empty string. Also sets the ID of the UpdateCoverageBenefitItem variable to the CoverageBenefitItemId variable.
assignments.name: SetOutOfNetworkCoverage
assignments.label: Set Out-of-Network Coverage

assignments.description: Sets the isPayerAssessmentResponseReceived variable to true.
assignments.name: SetPayerAssessmentResponseStatus
assignments.label: Set Payer Assessment Response Status

assignments.description: Sets the isPayerAssessmentResponseReceived variable to false.
assignments.name: SetPayerAssessmentResponseStatusFalse
assignments.label: Set Payer Assessment Response Status

assignments.description: Sets the IsInPlanNetwork, InNetworkCoverage, and OutofNetworkCoverage fields on the UpdateCoverageBenefitItem variable to false and empty strings. Also sets the ID of the UpdateCoverageBenefitItem variable to the CoverageBenefitItemId variable.
assignments.name: SetPlanNetworkNotApplicable
assignments.label: Set Plan Network Not Applicable

assignments.description: Sets the IsPreauthorizationRequired field on the UpdateCoverageBenefitItem variable to true. Also sets the ID of the UpdateCoverageBenefitItem variable to the CoverageBenefitItemId variable.
assignments.name: SetPreauthorizationRequiredTrue
assignments.label: Set Preauthorization Required

constants.description: Stores the text value of the status of the platform event that indicates the Payer assessment response was received.
constants.name: PayerAssessmentResponseReceivedEventStatus

constants.description: Stores the name of the Payer Assessment record.
constants.name: PayorAssessmentEnvelopeName

decisions.description: Determines whether the DeveloperName of the current record in the IterateOverCoverageBenefitItemLimits loop matches the name derived from the ExtractCoverageBenefitItemLimitNameFormula.
decisions.name: DoesCareLimitTypeNameMatch
decisions.label: Does Care Limit Type Name Match?

decisions.description: Determines whether the IsCoverageBenefitItemRequiresSave variable is true.
decisions.name: DoesCoverageBenefitItemRequireAnUpdate
decisions.label: Does CoverageBenefitItem Require an Update?

decisions.description: Determines whether the IsCoverageBenefitRequiresSave variable is true.
decisions.name: DoesCoverageBenefitRequireAnUpdate
decisions.label: Does CoverageBenefit Require an Update?

decisions.description: Determines whether the UpdateCoverageBenefitItemLimitList collection is not empty.
decisions.name: IsCoverageBenefitItemLimitUpdateRequired
decisions.label: Is Coverage Benefit Item Limit Update Required?

decisions.description: Determines whether the IsPreauthorizationRequired field on the CoverageBenefitItem record should be set to true or false.
decisions.name: SetPreauthorizationRequired
decisions.label: Set Preauthorization Required

decisions.description: Determines which CoverageBenefit field to update based on the name of the current record in the IterateOverAssessmentQuestionResponses loop.
decisions.name: SetWhichCoverageBenefitField
decisions.label: Set Which Coverage Benefit Field?

decisions.description: Determines which CoverageBenefitItem field to update based on the name of the current record in the IterateOverAssessmentQuestionResponses loop.
decisions.name: SetWhichCoverageBenefitItemField
decisions.label: Set Which CoverageBenefitItem Field?

decisions.description: Determines which object to update based on the name of the current record in the IterateOverAssessmentQuestionResponses loop.
decisions.name: SetWhichObject
decisions.label: Set Which Object?

decisions.description: Determines whether the plan network status is In, Out, or Not Applicable based on the response value of the current record in the IterateOverAssessmentQuestionResponses loop.
decisions.name: SetWhichPlanNetworkStatus
decisions.label: Set Which Plan Network Status?

formulas.description: Generates the name prefix for the Benefits Notes field by combining a fixed prefix "LSC_BV_v", the version number, and _CoverageBenefit_BenefitsNNotes. Used in IterateOverAssessmethe IterateOverAssessmentQuestionResponsesntQuestionResponses loop that checks whether a response name starts with this value so the flow can capture the BenefitsNotes.
formulas.name: AssessmentResponseNameBenefitNoteFmla

formulas.description: Generates the name prefix for the Final Coverage Status Code field by combining a fixed prefix "LSC_BV_v", the version number, and _CoverageBenefit_FinalCoverageStatusCodeId. Used in the IterateOverAssessmentQuestionResponses loop condition that checks whether a response name starts with this value so the flow can capture the FinalCoverageStatusCodeId.
formulas.name: AssessmentResponseNameFinalCvrStsCdFmla

formulas.description: Generates a prefix for CoverageBenefitItem record by combining the static text "LSC_BV_v", the text value of the VersionNumber variable, and the static text "_CoverageBenefitItemlist_"
formulas.name: CoverageBenefitItemLimitPrefixFormula

formulas.description: Generates a prefix for CoverageBenefitItem record by combining the static text "LSC_BV_v", the text value of the VersionNumber variable, and the static text "_CoverageBenefitItem_"
formulas.name: CoverageBenefitItemPrefixFormula

formulas.description: Generates a prefix for CoverageBenefit record by combining the static text "LSC_BV_v", the text value of the VersionNumber variable, and the static text "_CoverageBenefit_"
formulas.name: CoverageBenefitPrefixFormula

formulas.description: Removes a specific prefix and suffix from the name of the current record in the IterateOverAssessmentQuestionResponses loop. It first removes the prefix that contains 'LSC_BV_v', the flow version number, and 'CoverageBenefitItemLimit_'.
formulas.name: ExtractCoverageBenefitItemLimitNameFormula

formulas.description: Extracts the version number from the name of the Assessment Question Response and stores it in the VersionNumber variable.
formulas.name: ExtractVersionFormula

Flow.interviewLabel: Copy Payer Assessment Response to Care Benefit Verify Request Records {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Copy Payer Assessment Response to Care Benefit Verify Request Records Clone

loops.description: Repeats actions for each record in the Assessment Envelope Items from GetPayerAssessmentEnvelope record collection.
loops.name: IterateOverAssessmentEnvelopeItems
loops.label: Iterate Over Assessment Envelope Items

loops.description: Repeats actions for each record in the Assessment Question Responses from GetAssessmentQuestionResponses record collection.
loops.name: IterateOverAssessmentQuestionResponses
loops.label: Iterate Over Assessment Question Responses

loops.description: Repeats actions for each record in the Assessment Question Responses from GetAssessmentQuestionResponses record collection.
loops.name: IterateOverAssessmentQuestionResponsesGetVersionNumber
loops.label: Iterate Over Assessment Question Responses

loops.description: Repeats actions for each record in the Coverage Benefit Item Limits from GetCoverageBenefitItemLimits record collection.
loops.name: IterateOverCoverageBenefitItemLimits
loops.label: Iterate Over Coverage Benefit Item Limits

loops.description: Repeats actions for each record in the Coverage Benefit Items from GetCoverageBenefit record collection.
loops.name: IterateOverCoverageBenefitItems
loops.label: Iterate Over Coverage Benefit Items

recordLookups.description: Gets the Assessment Question Response records with an Assessment ID that matches the AssessmentId variable. Stores the Id, Name, and ResponseValue of the result in the Assessment Question Responses from GetAssessmentQuestionResponses record collection.
recordLookups.name: GetAssessmentQuestionResponses
recordLookups.label: Get Assessment Question Responses

recordLookups.description: Gets the Care Benefit Verify Request record with an ID that matches careBenefitVerifyRequestId. Stores the Id, Status, AuthrizedPrescriptionId, and CoverageBenefitId of the result in the Care Benefit Verify Request from GetCareBenefitVerifyRequest record variable.
recordLookups.name: GetCareBenefitVerifyRequest
recordLookups.label: Get Care Benefit Verify Request

recordLookups.description: Gets the Coverage Benefit Item Limit records that matches the CoverageBenefitItemId variable. Stores the results in the Coverage Benefit Item Limits from GetCoverageBenefitItemLimits record collection.
recordLookups.name: GetCoverageBenefitItemLimits
recordLookups.label: Get Coverage Benefit Item Limits

recordLookups.description: Gets the Assessment Envelope record with a RequestReferenceId that matches careBenefitVerifyRequestId, a name that matches PayerAssessmentEnvelopeName, and a status that is completed. Stores the AssessmentEnvelopeItem from GetAssessmentEnvelope in the AssessmentEnvelopeItem from GetPayerAssessmentEnvelope record variable.
recordLookups.name: GetPayerAssessmentEnvelope
recordLookups.label: Get Payer Assessment Envelope

recordUpdates.description: Updates a record using the values from the UpdatedCoverageBenefit record variable.
recordUpdates.name: Update_Coverage_Benefit
recordUpdates.label: Update Coverage Benefit

recordUpdates.description: Updates a record using the values from the UpdateCoverageBenefitItem record variable.
recordUpdates.name: Update_Coverage_Benefit_Item
recordUpdates.label: Update Coverage Benefit Item

recordUpdates.description: Updates records using the values in the UpdateCoverageBenefitItemLimitList record collection.
recordUpdates.name: UpdateCoverageBenefitItemLimits
recordUpdates.label: Update Coverage Benefit Item Limits

textTemplates.description: Stores the body of the text template notifying the user that the Payer assessment response timed out.
textTemplates.name: PayerAssessmentResponseTimedoutTextTemplate
textTemplates.text: Failed::Connect with the payor to get the latest benefits.

variables.description: Stores the ID of the Assessment record that contains the questions that were answered.
variables.name: AssessmentId

variables.description: Stores the name of the Assessment Question Response.
variables.name: AssessmentQuestionName

variables.description: Stores the care benefit verify request ID that was passed into this flow.
variables.name: careBenefitVerifyRequestId

variables.description: Stores the ID of the Coverage Benefit Item record that is associated with the Care Benefit Verify Request record.
variables.name: CoverageBenefitItemId

variables.description: Stores the ID of the related object for the flow orchestrator instance and is passed into the flow.
variables.name: flowOrchestratorInstanceRelatedObjectId

variables.description: Stores a boolean value that indicates whether the Coverage Benefit Item record requires an update. The default value is False.
variables.name: IsCoverageBenefitItemRequiresSave

variables.description: Stores a boolean value that indicates whether the Coverage Benefit record requires an update. The default value is False.
variables.name: IsCoverageBenefitRequiresSave

variables.description: Stores a boolean value that indicates whether the Payer assessment response was received and is available as output from the flow.
variables.name: isPayorAssessmentResponseReceived

variables.description: Stores the step number of the benefit verification process that is passed into the flow.
variables.name: stepNumber

variables.description: Stores the updated Coverage Benefit Item record.
variables.name: UpdateCoverageBenefitItem

variables.description: Stores the version number of the Assessment record.
variables.name: VersionNumber

waits.description: Pauses the flow until a Care Benefit Verify Request Status Change event is received where the event’s request identifier matches the careBenefitVerifyRequestId variable and a status that indicates the Payer assessment response was received. If a response isn’t received, the flow resumes after 30 days and saves an error message. To use a different time-out period, update the Time Offset and Time Offset Unit fields in the TimeOut For Payer Assessment Response wait event.
waits.name: WaitforPayerAssessmentResponse
waits.label: Wait for Payer Assessment Response
